title: Our Love Story
content:
It all began as schoolmates, sharing simple moments in classrooms and hallways until friendship slowly became something deeper.

As workmates, we discovered how strong we were as a team. Through busy days and long hours, we kept showing up for each other.

We became food buddies, turning ordinary meals into little celebrations and collecting memories one bite at a time.

Then came our adventures as travel buddies, exploring new places, chasing sunsets, and choosing each other in every journey.

Now, as proud furr parents, our home is fuller, happier, and filled with love. From schoolmates to soulmates, every chapter led us here.

timeline.title: Schoolmates
timeline.description: It all began as schoolmates, sharing simple moments in classrooms and hallways until friendship slowly became something deeper.

timeline.title: Workmates and Food Buddies
timeline.description: As workmates, we became a team, and as food buddies, we turned ordinary meals into unforgettable memories.

timeline.title: Travel and Furr Family
timeline.description: As travel buddies and now furr parents, we built a life full of adventure, warmth, and love that keeps growing every day.
